title: Lane D: Design System Completion & Missing Components
consumer_purpose: Complete v2 design system with animation tokens, Slider, ColorPicker, and EmptyState components
content:
# Plan Revision 2 — Addressing Critic Findings

## Changes from Revision 1
- Animation tokens moved from ResolvedTheme to v2/styles/theme.css CSS variables only (no type widening, avoids breaking change to ResolvedTheme)
- Removed separate v1 cleanup lane (will do inventory-only, no file changes)
- Added error states: Slider min>max validation, ColorPicker invalid hex handling, EmptyState icon fallback
- All new components include `data-component` attributes, aria attributes, and keyboard navigation
- Stories follow established v2 Storybook pattern

## Work Items

### 1. Animation Design System Tokens
- Add `--v2-duration-*` and `--v2-ease-*` CSS variables to v2/styles/theme.css (both light and dark sections, values are identical)
- Add unprefixed alias tokens to styles/animations.css for legacy compatibility
- Apply tokens to button-v2.css (add transitions using animation vars)
- Apply tokens to dialog-v2.css (add enter/exit animations using animation vars)

### 2. Slider Component
- `slider-v2.tsx` — Kobalte @kobalte/core/slider wrapper
- `slider-v2.css` — v2-pattern CSS with data-component selectors
- `slider-v2.stories.tsx` — Storybook stories

### 3. ColorPicker Component
- `color-picker-v2.tsx` — Custom picker with hex input + swatch grid + native color input
- `color-picker-v2.css` — v2-pattern CSS
- `color-picker-v2.stories.tsx` — Storybook stories

### 4. EmptyState Component
- `empty-state-v2.tsx` — Presentational with icon slot, title, description, action
- `empty-state-v2.css` — Mount animation, variant styles
- `empty-state-v2.stories.tsx` — Storybook stories

## Component Architecture (all follow established v2 patterns):
- TSX: `splitProps`, `data-component="xxx"`, `data-slot="xxx"`, `classList` merge
- CSS: `[data-component="xxx"]`, CSS nesting, `--v2-*` CSS variables, CSS transitions
- Stories: `title: "UI V2/ComponentName"`, `id`, `args`, `argTypes`
- No new runtime dependencies
revision_notes: Addressed critic findings: animation tokens stay as CSS vars (not in ResolvedTheme), added error states to components, removed scope-creeping v1 cleanup items
